case_title: YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O VS GIEL, RAY W. R/O

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $517.53 FILED BY YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O AS TO DEFENDANT GIEL, RAY W.    R/O ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
UNTIMELY SERVICE; DEFENDANT WAS NOT GIVEN 25 DAYS NOTICE FOR SUBSTITUTED SERVICE FOR OUT OF COUNTY.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIEL, RAY W.    R/O $258.76 PRINCIPAL, $57.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $315.76 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GIEL, RAY W.    R/O
